phrases.intent_en: Ask what kind of neighborhood Pâquis is
phrases.text_local: Quel type de quartier sont les Pâquis ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel TEEP duh kar-TYAY SOHN lay PAH-kee
phrases.cultural_note: Les Pâquis is Geneva's most cosmopolitan and lively neighbourhood, located between Cornavin station and the lake. It has a diverse, international character with many restaurants, bars and shops.

responses.english: It's straight ahead, a five-minute walk.
responses.phonetic: OO ES / EH lah GAHR kor-nah-VAN seel voo PLEH
responses.local: C'est tout droit, à cinq minutes à pied.

phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous me recommander un restaurant dans les Pâquis ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY-voo muh ruh-koh-mohn-DAY un res-toh-ROHN don lay PAH-kee
phrases.cultural_note: The Pâquis has one of the most diverse dining scenes in Geneva, with Ethiopian, Thai, Lebanese, Turkish and Swiss restaurants side by side.

responses.english: Yes, try Café du Soleil for a traditional fondue.
responses.phonetic: POO-vay voo muh ruh-kuh-mAHnd uh(n) / uhn res-toh-RAH(n) dah(n) lay pah-KEE
responses.local: Oui, essayez le Café du Soleil pour une fondue traditionnelle.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un marché le matin dans ce quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un mar-SHAY luh mah-TAN don suh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: A lively morning market takes place on the Place de la Navigation in the Pâquis on Tuesday and Friday mornings, selling fresh produce, flowers and international foods.

responses.english: Yes, there is a daily market at place des Pâquis.
responses.phonetic: ee-GREK ah tay eel uhn, uhn MAR-shuh luh mah-TAN don suh kar-TYAY
responses.local: Oui, il y a un marché quotidien place des Pâquis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the area is safe at night
phrases.text_local: Le quartier des Pâquis est-il sûr la nuit ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh kar-TYAY day PAH-kee eh-TEEL SOOR lah NWEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Pâquis is lively and generally safe, though some streets near the station are animated late at night. It is a well-policed urban neighbourhood.

responses.phonetic: OO es-tuh LA-reh duh TRAHM luh PLOO ploo PROSH
responses.local: C'est juste au coin de la rue.
